A Creative Director's Story

“Give me facts, I might listen.
Tell me a storyand you have my attention.”

— Professor John McHale, Illinois State University

“Above all else?”

“Clarity!”

I don't think the standard resume format is particularly good for storytelling. Today, we use AI tools to write resumes for ATS systems. I send those too. But if you're here, let me try something different.

Let me tell you my story.

Read My StorySee My Work

Five Chapters of Reinvention

I've shifted and reinvented myself every time my professional roles demanded it. From aspiring professor to AI platform builder.

Chapter 01

The Photographer

2001-2003

SIU. Commercial photography. A dream of becoming a professor.

Chapter 02

The Pivot

Senior Year

My son was born. I became a jeweler. Then digital media called.

Chapter 03

The Designer

2011-2016

Electrolux. Promoted to Creative Director. Built systems, not just pixels.

Chapter 04

The Systems Builder

2016-2024

Sealed Air. PIM. DAM. 3D visualization. Infrastructure for storytelling.

Chapter 05

The AI Explorer

Now

Building an AI agentic ABM platform. Looking for what's next.

Read the full story
